raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch swehre-
ja un fazzija : Tik teeschaim ka
tas KUNGS dsihwo/ kas man-
nu Dwehseli no wiffahm Beh-
dahmi atpestijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Teeschaim / ka es tew ef-
nu pee ta KUNGA Israëta
Deewa swehrejs / fazzidains :
Salamans taws Dehls buhs
pehz mannis par Kehniru / un
tain buhs mannâ Weeta us man-
nu Gohda-Krehflu fehdeht / ta
patt es arridsan schodeen dar-
rischu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad paflannijahs Bat-
seba ar fawu Waigu pee Sem-
mes/un lohzijahs preeksch ta keh-
nina / un ta jazzija : Lai dsihwo
mans Kungs tas Kehninsch Dah-
wids muhschaim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch Dah-
wids fazzija : Atzinajeet man to
Preesteri Zadaku/ un to Prawee-
tu Nahtann/ un Benaju Jojada
Dehlu / un tee nahze preeksch to
Kehninu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch fazzija
us teem: Nemmeet pee few juh-
fu Kunga Kalpus / un leezeet
mannu Dehlu Salamann us to
Sirg-Ehseka-Mahti / kas man
peederr/ jaht/ un weddeet winnu
us Gionu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un lai tas Preesteris Za-
daks/ un tas Praweets Nah-
tans winnu tur par Kehninu
pahr Israëlu fwaida. Pehz puh-
teet juhs ar Trummetehin / un
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz eita juhs wiꞥſch
pakkat augfchaim/un lai tas n
un us mannii Gohda-Kre
fehsch/ un wiꞥſch buhs par
nixu mannâ Weeta. Un es
wehlefschu tam par Waldi
buht pahr Israëtu un pahr Ju
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja Ben
Jojada Dehls tam Kehnins
un fazzija : Amen! lai
KUNGS manna Kunga ta
nixa Deewa ta patt fakka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ittin ka tas KUN
ar mannii Kungu to Kehnins
jis/ ta patt lai wiꞥſch irr ar
lamannu/ ka winna Gohda-K
lis leelaks tohp ne ka manna
ga ta Kehnina Dahwida Go
Krehflis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nogahje tas Pre
ris Zadaks/ un tas Pra
Nahtans/ un Benajus Jo
Dehls/ un tee Kreeti un Pl
un likke Salamannu us to
Ehseka-Mahti ta Kehnina
wida jaht/ un pawaddija t
Gionu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Preesteris Za
nehine to Etjes-Raggu no
Telts/ un fwaidija Salam
Un tee puhte ar Trummete
un wiffi Laudis fazzija : La
wo tas Kehninsch Salaman
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiffi Laudis
winnam pakkat us augfch
tee Laudis stabuleja ar S
lehn/ un preezajahs ar leelu
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
